_comment: Cross-language contract for the instance lifecycle status wire string (the `status` field of instance responses). theyos store-rs `InstanceStatus` is the source of truth; these are exactly the values it EMITS via `InstanceStatus::as_str()`. soyeht-ios vendors this file VERBATIM and mirrors it as a fail-soft Swift `InstanceStatus` enum. The legacy receive-only alias `error` (`FromStr` accepts it as `Failed`) is deliberately NOT a contract wire and is covered by a separate receive-compat test.
